mnemonics.title: VFP Rule
mnemonics.content: Virtual Functions enable Polymorphism - Remember VFP as Virtual Function Polymorphism

mnemonics.title: Destructor Rule
mnemonics.content: Virtual Destructors Prevent Leaks - VDP Leaks (When using base pointers to derived objects, always use virtual destructors)

mnemonics.title: Pure Virtual Rule
mnemonics.content: Pure Virtual = Abstract Class - PVAC (Classes with Pure Virtual functions become Abstract Classes)
